task_completion.description: Verify that the EdrawMax canvas is set to landscape orientation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a wide, horizontal canvas in the Wondershare EdrawMax workspace.

task_completion.description: Verify the inclusion of a decorative border and a badge or seal icon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a graphical border around the edge of the canvas and a graphic resembling a badge, ribbon, or seal placed on the certificate.

task_completion.description: Verify all required text is present on the certificate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the text on the canvas to ensure it includes 'Certificate of Achievement', 'Jordan Lee', 'Summit Tech Solutions', 'For Outstanding Performance as Employee of the Month', and 'October 2025'.

task_completion.description: Verify the project is saved as an EDDX file with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the application title bar, a save dialog, or the file manager for 'certificate_jordan_lee.eddx' in /home/ga/Documents/.

task_completion.description: Verify the design is exported as a PDF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an export dialog, a success message, or the file 'certificate_jordan_lee.pdf' in the file manager under /home/ga/Documents/.

task_completion.description: Verify the design is exported as a PNG.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an export dialog, a success message, or the file 'certificate_jordan_lee.png' in the file manager under /home/ga/Documents/.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Wondershare EdrawMax GUI to design the certificate.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing active interaction with the EdrawMax interface (menus, toolbars, canvas), rather than just terminal commands generating files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent created the certificate elements rather than just renaming an existing file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate steps showing the placement of text, borders, and icons on the canvas.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just create a plain text file or use a script to bypass the design requirement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final output must be a visually designed certificate in EdrawMax, not a terminal script output or a basic text editor file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output paths are /home/ga/Documents/certificate_jordan_lee.eddx, /home/ga/Documents/certificate_jordan_lee.pdf, and /home/ga/Documents/certificate_jordan_lee.png. The certificate must contain the exact text strings: 'Jordan Lee', 'Summit Tech Solutions', 'Certificate of Achievement', 'For Outstanding Performance as Employee of the Month', and 'October 2025'.
